name: Lady Sempescu
description_en: Lady Sempescu is a noble woman, whom was lured by Solitude. Sempescu wanted to help her, deceived by her appearance. Presumably, she was killed along with her 1 yordle servant.
description_fr: Lady Sempescu est une femme noble attirée par Solitude. Sempescu voulut l'aider, trompé par son apparence. Vraisemblablement, elle a été tuée avec son 1 yordle serviteur.
